overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district during the golden hour. The character explores a futuristic cyberpunk environment with towering neon-lit skyscrapers and street vendors, then crosses an intersection and enters a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown boulevard with neon skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk toward the towering skyscrapers, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking past the camera toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with prominent green ORB AIR neon signage
large illuminated green advertisement screen with red triangular logo
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with glass facades and neon accents
outdoor dining area with large white umbrellas and red tables
tall black pole with traffic signals and Palm View street sign

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide downtown sidewalk during dusk, with the massive ORB AIR tower and surrounding skyscrapers dominating the skyline ahead. Neon billboards and street cafes line the path as sparse pedestrians move through the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection approach with multi-story parking

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn and begins walking back toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back toward the street intersection, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with multiple levels and blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back toward the intersection, with the skyscrapers now behind and a multi-story parking structure becoming visible on the left. The camera swings around to face the direction of the crosswalk and traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway approach

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing vehicles to proceed through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection while monitoring the traffic light change

notable_agents.action: dark sedan accelerating through the intersection after the light turns green

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track with distinctive blue painted beams and red structural accents
gray concrete building with grid-patterned windows and ground-level storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street as the traffic signal changes from red to green, with vehicles beginning to move through the intersection. The blue overpass structure becomes prominent on the left as the character approaches the covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with vending machines

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the blue overpass, transitioning from natural dusk light to artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past illuminated vending machines and concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hair wearing blue suspenders and carrying a briefcase walking toward the camera

entered.detail: bright purple and yellow automated vending machines with glowing product displays
large white cylindrical pillar supporting the overpass structure overhead
large illuminated digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on the right wall
concrete stairs with blue painted edges leading up to the overpass level

segments.scene_description: The character enters the darker, covered walkway beneath the blue overpass, where artificial lighting from purple vending machines and digital billboards illuminates the path. Concrete support pillars line the walkway as pedestrians pass by in the enclosed urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from an open, neon-lit skyline into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins with the character walking along a wide sidewalk toward the towering ORB AIR building and surrounding skyscrapers under a dusk sky. As the character turns back toward a busy intersection, the camera swings around to reveal a multi-story parking structure and the glow of traffic signals. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the street amidst moving vehicles, moving closer to a prominent blue overpass structure. Finally, the camera follows the character into the darker, enclosed walkway beneath the overpass, where the open city light is replaced by the purple glow of vending machines and digital billboards reflecting off concrete pillars.
